languages.text: "Раньше тут огромные твари какие-то жили, да все подохли. Корни уже после этого выросли. Мы то череп посередке корня найдем, то позвонок с трех человек размером. По всему видно, уже сквозь них проросло".

"Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."
languages.original_text: "Раньше тут огромные твари какие-то жили, да все подохли. Корни уже после этого выросли. Мы то череп посередке корня найдем, то позвонок с трех человек размером. По всему видно, уже сквозь них проросло".

traits.locale_text: "Some kind of huge creatures once inhabited this world, but they all died. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebrae the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots have been growing right through them."

"Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

"The bones indicate that some kind of huge creatures once inhabited this world, but they all died. Since then, the roots have grown so much that we often find a skull hanging above the ground, or a vertebrae embedded in the ground. But that was a long time ago, before we came."

"Some kind of huge creatures once inhabited this world, but they all died. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebrae the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots have been growing right through them."

"Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

"Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

languages.text: 「骨から、この世界にはかつて巨大な生物が棲んでいたと分かる。だがそいつらは皆、死に絶えた。それ以来、根があまりに繁茂して、地表の上に頭蓋骨がぶら下がっていたり、椎骨が地中にめり込んでいたりするのをよく見かける。もっとも、それは我々が来るずっと前の話だ」
languages.original_text: "The bones indicate that some kind of huge creatures once inhabited this world, but they all died. Since then, the roots have grown so much that we often find a skull hanging above the ground, or a vertebrae embedded in the ground. But that was a long time ago, before we came."

traits.locale_text: 「骨から、この世界にはかつて巨大な生物が棲んでいたと分かる。だがそいつらは皆、死に絶えた。それ以来、根があまりに繁茂して、地表の上に頭蓋骨がぶら下がっていたり、椎骨が地中にめり込んでいたりするのをよく見かける。もっとも、それは我々が来るずっと前の話だ。」

languages.text: « D'immenses créatures habitaient autrefois ce monde, mais elles se sont toutes éteintes, après quoi les racines sont apparues en surface. Il arrive fréquemment que nous retrouvions un crâne au milieu d'une excroissance ou une vertèbre de la taille de trois hommes. Visiblement, les racines les ont transpercés en poussant. »
languages.original_text: "Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

traits.locale_text: « D'immenses créatures habitaient autrefois ce monde, mais elles se sont toutes éteintes, après quoi les racines sont apparues en surface. Il arrive fréquemment que nous retrouvions un crâne au milieu d'une excroissance ou une vertèbre de la taille de trois hommes. Visiblement, les racines les ont transpercés en poussant. »

languages.text: "Bir zamanlar bu dünyada bir tür devasa yaratıklar yaşarmış. Hepsi yok olmuş. Kökler onlardan sonra çoğalmış. Sık sık bir kökün ortasında kafatasları ya da koca omuz kemikleri buluruz. Köklerin tam cesetlerin içinde ortaya çıktığı ortada."
languages.original_text: "Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

traits.locale_text: "Bir zamanlar bu dünyada bir tür devasa yaratıklar yaşarmış. Hepsi yok olmuş. Kökler onlardan sonra çoğalmış. Sık sık bir kökün ortasında kafatasları ya da koca omuz kemikleri buluruz. Köklerin tam cesetlerin içinde ortaya çıktığı ortada."

languages.text: «Antaño hubo algún tipo de criaturas enormes en el planeta, pero ya están todas extintas. Las raíces brotaron después de eso. A veces encontramos un cráneo empalado en un tallo, o una vértebra del tamaño de tres hombres. Es evidente que las raíces crecen a través de ellas».
languages.original_text: "Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

traits.locale_text: «Antaño hubo algún tipo de criaturas enormes en el planeta, pero ya están todas extintas. Las raíces brotaron después de eso. A veces encontramos un cráneo empalado en un tallo, o una vértebra del tamaño de tres hombres. Es evidente que las raíces crecen a través de ellas».

languages.text: “这个世界曾经住着某种巨大的生物，但它们都灭绝了。之后这些根系才长了出来。我们经常在根系正中间找到颅骨，或者三个人那么大的椎骨。你一看就会明白，根系是直接穿透它们长出来的。”
languages.original_text: "Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

traits.locale_text: “这个世界曾经住着某种巨大的生物，但它们都灭绝了。之后这些根系才长了出来。我们经常在根系正中间找到颅骨，或者三个人那么大的椎骨。你一看就会明白，根系是直接穿透它们长出来的。”

languages.text: "Früher lebten auf dieser Welt riesige Kreaturen, aber die sind längst ausgestorben. Danach kamen die Wurzeln. Wir finden immer wieder einen Schädel in einer Wurzel ... oder einen Rückenwirbel, der so groß wie drei Männer ist. Es ist offensichtlich, dass die Wurzeln einfach durch sie hindurchwuchsen."
languages.original_text: "Huge creatures of some kind once inhabited this world, but they all died out. The roots shot up after that. We often find a skull right in the middle of a root, or a vertebra the size of three men. It's clear as day, the roots had grown right through them."

traits.locale_text: "Früher lebten auf dieser Welt riesige Kreaturen, aber die sind längst ausgestorben. Danach kamen die Wurzeln. Wir finden immer wieder einen Schädel in einer Wurzel ... oder einen Rückenwirbel, der so groß wie drei Männer ist. Es ist offensichtlich, dass die Wurzeln einfach durch sie hindurchwuchsen."
